response:
This code implements **Algorithm R**, the classic unweighted reservoir sampling algorithm—a pattern for sampling from unknown/unbounded-length data streams (avoiding full in-memory storage) — to generate an unbiased random k-element subset *without replacement*. Every element in the entire stream has an equal probability (k/n, where n is the stream’s total length) of being selected into the returned reservoir.

(If condensing to 1 sentence: This code implements **Algorithm R**, the classic unweighted reservoir sampling algorithm—a pattern for sampling from unknown/unbounded-length data streams to avoid full in-memory storage—to generate an unbiased random k-element subset without replacement where every stream element has an equal probability (k/n, n = total stream length) of being selected.)
